description_long: This hardware store is a boxy, two-story commercial building with a predominantly yellow facade. The front features a large signboard with red dragon motifs and a blue atomic symbol, as well as a row of black-tinted windows above a set of larger display windows at street level. The side and rear walls are plain and unadorned, with the rear showing a small metallic access panel near the base. One side has a black rectangular structure, possibly an external utility box, while the other side is featureless. The roof is flat with a raised parapet and the signboard mounted on top. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements aside from the signage.
description: A yellow, boxy hardware store with a large decorative sign, black-tinted windows, and a flat roof. The facade is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation except for the prominent signage.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large black windows, and a prominent yellow signboard with red and blue graphics above the facade.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain yellow wall and the edge of the rooftop sign, with a black utility box attached near the rear.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a featureless yellow wall with a small metallic access panel at the bottom and the back of the rooftop sign visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows another plain yellow wall, with a black band featuring two blue circular graphics and some small text or symbols.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large yellow signboard with red dragon motifs and a blue atomic symbol, placed above the main windows; additional blue text or symbols run along the facade below the sign.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a prominent signboard above a row of black-tinted windows, with a main entrance at street level and no visible exterior displays or advertisements. The facade is symmetrical and simple, with the entrance centered below the windows.
